case_title: UPTON, ANNA-LOGAN SLOAN vs. CARDONA, RICHARD A.

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UPTON, ANNA-LOGAN SLOAN AS TO DEFENDANT CARDONA, RICHARD A. SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UPTON, ANNA-LOGAN SLOAN SERVED NOV-09-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARDONA, RICHARD A.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CARDONA, RICHARD A.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CARDONA, RICHARD A.
